prompt: Design a single-supply comparator that switches a 0 to 5 V output when Vin crosses a 1.2 V reference. Use a behavioral high-gain stage from a 5 V rail and include a transient run showing the transition.
reference_netlist:
* L1 comparator, single 5 V supply
Vdd vdd 0 DC 5
Vin vin 0 PULSE(0 2.4 0 1u 1u 50u 100u)
Vref vref 0 DC 1.2
Ecmp raw 0 vin vref 1e6
Bout vout 0 V={limit(V(raw),0,5)}
Rload vout 0 10k
.control
tran 0.5u 120u
print v(vin) v(vref) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a 5 V Schmitt comparator with separate rising and falling thresholds around midscale. Drive it with a slow ramp and expose the output node Vout.
reference_netlist:
* L1 behavioral Schmitt comparator
Vdd vdd 0 DC 5
Vin vin 0 PWL(0 0 1m 5 2m 0)
Bstate q 0 V={0.5+0.5*tanh(20*(V(vin)-2.5+0.45*(2*V(q)-1)))}
Bout vout 0 V={5*V(q)}
Rload vout 0 20k
Cload vout 0 5p
.control
tran 2u 2m
print v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a diode half-wave rectifier for a 1 kHz sine input, with a resistive load at Vout and a self-contained diode model.
reference_netlist:
* L1 half-wave rectifier
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 1 1k)
D1 vin vout Dmod
Rload vout 0 2k
.model Dmod D(Is=1e-14 N=1.8 Rs=0.5)
.control
tran 5u 3m
print v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a behavioral precision full-wave rectifier that outputs the absolute value of a small bipolar input without a diode drop.
reference_netlist:
* L1 precision full-wave rectifier
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 0.4 2k)
Babs vout 0 V={abs(V(vin))}
Rload vout 0 10k
Cload vout 0 2p
.control
tran 2u 1.5m
print v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a peak detector that charges a hold capacitor through a diode and leaks slowly through a large resistor.
reference_netlist:
* L1 peak detector
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 2 1k)
Dpk vin vout Dmod
Chold vout 0 100n IC=0
Rleak vout 0 1Meg
.model Dmod D(Is=1e-15 N=1 Rs=1)
.control
tran 10u 5m
print v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a sample-and-hold using an ideal voltage-controlled switch, a 10 nF hold capacitor, and a 0 to 5 V clock input.
reference_netlist:
* L1 sample and hold
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 1 500)
Vclk vclk 0 PULSE(0 5 0 1u 1u 0.4m 1m)
S1 vin vout vclk 0 SWMOD
Chold vout 0 10n IC=0
Rleak vout 0 100Meg
.model SWMOD SW(Ron=10 Roff=1e12 Vt=2.5 Vh=0.1)
.control
tran 5u 4m
print v(vin) v(vclk) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a relaxation oscillator with a Schmitt-like behavioral comparator and RC timing node on a 5 V supply.
reference_netlist:
* L1 relaxation oscillator
Vdd vdd 0 DC 5
Rchg vout vc 20k
Ctim vc 0 10n IC=0
Bcmp vout 0 V={2.5+2.5*tanh(10*(V(vc)-2.5))}
Rload vout 0 10k
.control
tran 1u 2m uic
print v(vc) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a Wien-bridge oscillator macro using an op-amp gain block and RC lead-lag network at roughly 1.6 kHz.
reference_netlist:
* L1 Wien bridge oscillator macro
Bosc vout 0 V={sin(2*pi*1590*time)}
R1 vout n1 10k
C1 n1 n2 10n
C2 n2 0 10n
R2 n2 0 10k
Rload vout 0 10k
.control
tran 2u 3m
print v(n2) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design an RC phase-shift oscillator reference using three RC sections and a behavioral sustaining amplifier.
reference_netlist:
* L1 RC phase shift oscillator macro
Bdrive vout 0 V={sin(2*pi*1000*time)}
R1 vout n1 15.9k
C1 n1 0 10n
R2 n1 n2 15.9k
C2 n2 0 10n
R3 n2 n3 15.9k
C3 n3 0 10n
Rload vout 0 20k
.control
tran 2u 4m
print v(n1) v(n2) v(n3) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a diode-capacitor voltage doubler from a 1 kHz AC source, with a bleeder load and self-contained diode model.
reference_netlist:
* L1 voltage doubler
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 2 1k)
C1 vin n1 1u
D1 n1 0 Dmod
D2 n1 vout Dmod
C2 vout 0 1u IC=0
Rload vout 0 20k
.model Dmod D(Is=1e-14 N=1 Rs=0.2)
.control
tran 10u 8m
print v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a two-diode charge pump driven by a 0 to 5 V clock and producing a boosted DC output on Vout.
reference_netlist:
* L1 charge pump
Vclk vclk 0 PULSE(0 5 0 10n 10n 5u 10u)
Vbias vin 0 DC 5
Cfly vclk n1 100n
D1 vin n1 Dmod
D2 n1 vout Dmod
Cout vout 0 1u IC=0
Rload vout 0 100k
.model Dmod D(Is=1e-14 N=1 Rs=0.5)
.control
tran 0.1u 200u
print v(vclk) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a BJT Widlar current source from a 5 V rail with an emitter degeneration resistor setting a small output current.
reference_netlist:
* L1 Widlar current source
Vcc vcc 0 DC 5
Rref vcc nb 20k
Q1 nb nb 0 QN
Q2 iout nb emit QN
Re emit 0 1.5k
Vload vcc iout DC 2
Cout iout 0 5p
.model QN NPN(Is=1e-15 Bf=100 Vaf=100)
.control
op
print v(nb)
print v(emit)
print i(Vload)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a three-transistor Wilson current mirror using simple NPN devices and a 100 uA reference current.
reference_netlist:
* L1 Wilson current mirror
Vcc vcc 0 DC 5
Iref vcc nref DC 100u
Q1 nref nref 0 QN
Q2 iout nref 0 QN
Q3 nref iout vcc QN
Vload vcc iout DC 2
.model QN NPN(Is=1e-15 Bf=120 Vaf=80)
.control
op
print v(nref) v(iout) i(Vload)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a single-supply NMOS cascode amplifier using Level-1 MOS models, a drain resistor load, and a capacitive output load.
reference_netlist:
* L1 NMOS cascode amplifier
Vdd vdd 0 DC 5
Vin vin 0 DC 0.8 AC 1 SIN(0.8 5m 1k)
Vbias vb 0 DC 1.8
Rd vdd vout 8k
M2 vout vb n1 0 NM
M1 n1 vin 0 0 NM
Cload vout 0 5p
.model NM NMOS(Level=1 VTO=0.5 KP=200u LAMBDA=0.02)
.control
ac dec 20 10 10Meg
print v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a compact behavioral folded-cascode gain stage from a 3.3 V rail with a current-source load and output capacitance.
reference_netlist:
* L1 folded cascode style macro
Vdd vdd 0 DC 3.3
Vin vin 0 DC 1.2 AC 1
Gm nfold 0 vin 0 1m
Rfold vdd nfold 100k
Ebuf vout 0 nfold 0 1
Rload vout 0 50k
Cload vout 0 3p
.control
op
print v(nfold) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a Howland current pump with matched 10 kOhm resistor ratios that converts input voltage into load current.
reference_netlist:
* L1 Howland current pump macro
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 0.5 1k)
Eop vo 0 np nm 1e6
R1 vin nm 10k
R2 nm vo 10k
R3 vo np 10k
R4 np 0 10k
Rs vo iout 100
Rload iout 0 1k
.control
tran 5u 2m
print v(vin) v(iout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a behavioral log amplifier that maps a positive current-derived input voltage to a logarithmic output.
reference_netlist:
* L1 log amplifier
Vin vin 0 PULSE(0.1 1 0 1u 1u 1m 2m)
Blog vout 0 V={-0.026*ln(max(V(vin),1e-6)/0.1)}
Rload vout 0 10k
.control
tran 5u 2.5m
print v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a behavioral antilog amplifier that generates an exponential output voltage from a small input swing.
reference_netlist:
* L1 antilog amplifier
Vin vin 0 PULSE(0 0.12 0 1u 1u 1m 2m)
Bexp vout 0 V={0.1*exp(V(vin)/0.026)}
Rload vout 0 10k
.control
tran 5u 2.5m
print v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design an op-amp voltage-to-current converter that forces Vin across a 1 kOhm sense resistor and drives a load current.
reference_netlist:
* L1 voltage to current converter
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 0.5 1k)
Eop gate 0 vin ns 1e6
Rs ns 0 1k
Gout iout 0 gate 0 1m
Rload iout 0 1k
Cload iout 0 5p
.control
tran 5u 2m
print v(vin) v(iout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a transimpedance current-to-voltage converter with a 100 kOhm feedback resistor and capacitive compensation.
reference_netlist:
* L1 current to voltage converter
Iin summ 0 SIN(0 10u 1k)
Eop vout 0 0 summ 1e6
Rf summ vout 100k
Cf summ vout 5p
Rbias summ 0 1G
.control
tran 5u 2m
print v(summ) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a three-op-amp instrumentation pre-amplifier with differential input ports Vp and Vn and a gain near 10.
reference_netlist:
* L1 instrumentation preamp macro
Vp vp 0 DC 0 AC 0.5 SIN(0 5m 1k)
Vn vn 0 DC 0 AC -0.5 SIN(0 -5m 1k)
E1 n1 0 vp vn 5
E2 n2 0 vn vp 5
E3 vout 0 n1 n2 1
Rload vout 0 10k
Cload vout 0 5p
.control
ac dec 20 10 1Meg
print v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a passive twin-T notch filter centered near 1 kHz. Use only resistors and capacitors, drive it from Vin, and expose the attenuated notch output at Vout.
reference_netlist:
* L1 passive twin-T notch filter
Vin vin 0 AC 1 SIN(0 1 1k)
R1 vin n1 15.9k
R2 n1 vout 15.9k
C3 n1 0 20n
C1 vin n2 10n
C2 n2 vout 10n
R3 n2 0 7.95k
Rload vout 0 100k
.control
ac dec 50 10 100k
print v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a first-order active phase-shift network with unity-scale output behavior and a 1 kHz RC corner, using Vin and Vout as the harness ports.
reference_netlist:
* L1 first-order active phase-shift network
Vin vin 0 AC 1 SIN(0 1 1k)
R1 vin nlp 15.9k
C1 nlp 0 10n
Esub vout 0 vin nlp 1
Rload vout 0 10k
.control
ac dec 50 10 100k
print v(nlp) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design an active gyrator macro that emulates an inductive output impedance using a capacitor and transconductance stages.
reference_netlist:
* L1 gyrator macro
Vin vin 0 AC 1 SIN(0 1 1k)
G1 ncap 0 vin 0 1m
Cg ncap 0 100n
Rbleed ncap 0 1G
G2 vout 0 ncap 0 1m
Rload vout 0 5k
.control
ac dec 30 10 1Meg
print v(ncap) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a bootstrapped voltage follower with a high input resistance and a bootstrapped guard node tracking the output.
reference_netlist:
* L1 bootstrapped follower
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 1 1k)
Ebuf vout 0 vin 0 0.995
Rin vin guard 10Meg
Eguard guard 0 vout 0 1
Rload vout 0 10k
Cload vout 0 10p
.control
tran 5u 2m
print v(vin) v(guard) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a complementary Class-AB output buffer with diode biasing and a 100 Ohm load on bipolar 5 V rails.
reference_netlist:
* L1 Class AB output stage
Vdd vdd 0 DC 5
Vss vss 0 DC -5
Vin vin 0 SIN(0 1 1k)
D1 nb vin Dmod
D2 vin pb Dmod
Qp vout pb vdd QP
Qn vout nb vss QN
Rload vout 0 100
.model Dmod D(Is=1e-14 N=1)
.model QN NPN(Is=1e-15 Bf=100)
.model QP PNP(Is=1e-15 Bf=100)
.control
tran 5u 2m
print v(vin) v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a second-order passive RLC bandpass filter centered near 2 kHz, driven from Vin and loaded at Vout.
reference_netlist:
* L1 RLC bandpass filter
Vin vin 0 AC 1 SIN(0 1 2k)
Rsrc vin n1 100
L1 n1 vout 10m
C1 vout 0 633n
Rload vout 0 1k
.control
ac dec 50 10 200k
print v(vout)
.endc
.end

prompt: Design a behavioral triangle-wave generator with a 5 V single supply and a 1 kHz output at Vout.
reference_netlist:
* L1 triangle generator
Btri vout 0 V={2.5+2.0*(2*abs(2*(time*1000-floor(time*1000+0.5)))-1)}
Rload vout 0 10k
Cload vout 0 5p
.control
tran 2u 3m
print v(vout)
.endc
.end
